name: Linear solve with iterative refinement
task: Create /tmp/eval_iref/iref.py with solve_with_refinement(A, b, max_iter=10, tol=1e-13) solving Ax = b. First produce x by LU decomposition with partial pivoting; then iteratively refine: r = b - Ax, solve A delta = r using the same LU factors, set x = x + delta. Stop when max|r_i| < tol.
